hero.headline: Admissions Chatbot —
hero.description: Get accurate info about programs, tuition, scholarships, and application process — anytime.

highlights.label: Response
highlights.description: Quick answers to common admissions questions.

highlights.label: Content
highlights.description: Always available for program, tuition, and application info.

highlights.label: Counseling
highlights.description: Suggested Q&A pathway before contacting admissions.

hero.orUseChatbox: or use the chatbox on the right

leadForm.title: Complete your info to get started
leadForm.description: At least one contact method needed — email or phone.

chat.title: VinUni Admissions Assistant
chat.subtitle: Always ready to help
chat.welcomeMessage: Hello! I can help with info about {{highlight1}}, {{highlight2}}, {{highlight3}}, and {{highlight4}}.
chat.enterToSend: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.counselorRequested: Counselor connection request received. Team will respond soon.
chat.counselorRequestSent: Counselor connection request sent. Team will respond soon.
chat.errorSend: Cannot send message right now. Please try again later.
chat.errorCreateLead: Cannot create lead right now. Please check your information.
chat.errorCounselor: Cannot send counselor request right now. Please try again later.
chat.aiWithCounselorInvited: AI is assisting, a counselor has been invited
chat.counselorMessageBanner: Messages from the counselor will be highlighted in this conversation.
chat.aiSupportPendingCounselor: While waiting for the counselor to respond, VinUni AI continues to assist you.
chat.aiDirectlySupporting: VinUni AI is directly supporting this conversation.
chat.counselorMonitoring: {{name}} is following and replying directly in this conversation.
chat.counselorInvitedNotice: {{name}} has been invited to the conversation. While waiting for a response, AI can still assist you.
chat.counselorAlreadyChattingWith: You are being assisted by {{name}} in this conversation.
chat.counselorAlreadyInvitedToChat: {{name}} has been invited to this chat. AI will continue to assist while waiting.
chat.counselorRequestFailedToast: Unable to connect with a counselor right now. Please try again later.
chat.welcomeIntro: Hello! I can help with info about

telegram.title: Send Telegram Message
telegram.description: Send a message directly to a Telegram chat via Bot API.
telegram.error: Cannot send message. Please check the Chat ID and try again.

programsSubtitle: Discover VinUniversity's world-class undergraduate and graduate programs designed to shape future leaders.
applyCtaText: Join thousands of students who chose VinUniversity for their higher education journey.

programs.title: Programs Built For Real-World Leadership
programs.description: Students learn through interdisciplinary coursework, experiential projects, and mentorship from faculty and industry partners.
learningModelItems: Early exposure to research and innovation
Career readiness embedded in every semester

business.title: Business and Management
business.description: Practice-based learning with project studios, case clinics, and startup mentoring.

engineering.title: Science and Engineering
engineering.description: Strong foundation in STEM with lab work, research pathways, and industry capstones.

health.title: Health Sciences
health.description: Integrated clinical thinking, public health impact, and interdisciplinary teamwork.

law.title: Law and Public Policy
law.description: Policy analysis, legal reasoning, and leadership for complex societal challenges.

arts.title: Arts and Design
arts.description: Creative practice with portfolio-driven outcomes and cross-disciplinary collaboration.

digital.title: Digital and Data Studies
digital.description: Data literacy, AI fluency, and problem-solving skills across every field of study.

scholarship.title: Investment In Potential, Not Just Performance
scholarship.description: Scholarship decisions are aligned with admissions outcomes, helping applicants evaluate their options early and plan confidently.

merit.title: Merit Scholarship
merit.description: For high-achieving applicants with strong academic records.

needBased.title: Need-based Support
needBased.description: Additional financial support based on family circumstances.

talent.title: Talent Scholarship
talent.description: For exceptional achievements in leadership, arts, sports, or innovation.

timeline: Receive admission and scholarship decision together

conditions.title: What We Look For In Applicants
conditions.description: Admissions decisions are based on a holistic review across academic performance, personal potential, and alignment with program goals.

academic.title: Academic Readiness
items: Strong high school results or equivalent credentials
Consistent performance in relevant subject groups

language.title: Language Proficiency
items: English proficiency aligned with program expectations
Evidence of communication skills for global learning

leadership.title: Leadership And Engagement
items: Community involvement, projects, or initiative building

statement.title: Personal Statement
items: Reflection on values, impact, and growth mindset

process.title: A Clear Admission Process, Step By Step
process.description: We keep the process structured and transparent so applicants can plan their timelines and prepare confidently.

application.title: Build Your Application
application.text: Complete the form and upload transcripts, certificates, and supporting materials.

review.title: Holistic Review
review.text: The admissions committee evaluates academic profile, personal fit, and potential.

interview.title: Interview Stage
interview.text: Shortlisted applicants are invited to interviews online or in person.

decision.title: Final Decision
decision.text: Receive your admission outcome and next-step guidance for enrollment.
